rules.name: Finanzamt Full Names
rules.description: Matches 'Finanzamt' followed by complex location names, specifically handling 'St. Johann Tamsweg Zell am See', 'Klagenfurt St. Veit Wolfsberg', 'Braunau Ried Schärding', 'Gmunden Vöcklabruck', 'Landeck Reutte', 'Vorarlberg', 'Wien 8/16/17', 'Kirchdorf Perg Steyr', 'Steiermark Mitte', 'Spittal Villach', 'Purkersdorf', 'Linz', etc., and newly added: 'Bruck Eisenstadt Oberwart', 'Baden Mödling', 'Salzburg-Stadt', 'Schwechat Gerasdorf', 'Oststeiermark'.

rules.name: FA Abbreviations
rules.description: Matches 'FA' followed by complex location names, specifically handling 'Wien 8/16/17', 'Kirchdorf Perg Steyr', 'Steiermark Mitte', 'Spittal Villach', 'Gmunden Vöcklabruck', 'Landeck Reutte', 'Vorarlberg', 'St. Johann Tamsweg Zell am See', 'Klagenfurt St. Veit Wolfsberg', 'Braunau Ried Schär ding', 'Purkersdorf', 'Linz', etc., and newly added: 'Niederösterreich Mitte', 'Tirol Ost', 'Freistadt Rohrbach Urfahr', 'Linz', 'Graz-Stadt'.

rules.name: Raiffeisenkasse Names
rules.description: Matches 'Raiffeisenkasse' followed by a location name, including hyphenated locations like 'Retz-Pulkautal'.

rules.name: Court Names General
rules.description: Matches 'Bezirksgericht', 'Landesgericht', 'LG', 'BG' followed by location names, including 'für ZRS' variations.

rules.name: WWW FA Grieskirchen Wels
rules.description: Matches the specific known entity 'www.FA Grieskirchen Wels' including the www. prefix.

rules.name: Raiffeisenbank Names
rules.description: Matches 'Raiffeisenbank' followed by location names, explicitly handling the long form 'Karnische Rion Bankstelle St.Stefan' and other complex multi-word locations.

rules.name: FA Wien 1/23
rules.description: Matches the specific abbreviation 'FA Wien 1/23' which was missed by the generic FA rule.

rules.description: Matches 'Amazon Transport GmbH' including cases with double spaces.

rules.description: Matches 'Österreichischen Post Aktiengesellschaft' and similar post company names.

rules.name: Insurance Companies
rules.description: Matches specific insurance company names found in training data, including genitive forms and full names.

rules.name: Universities

rules.description: Matches 'Finanzamt Österreich' including the optional '(DST12)' suffix, but excludes it when followed by '(vormals des ...)' to avoid false positives in historical context references.
